form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Kingsbrae Maggie beaten 4.5 lengths (18.30). Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (17.81) over 300m at this track. Has a solid record off the tricky draw but appears tested on latest effort.
